title: pi-lens tree-sitter query rule
description: A single tree-sitter query rule loaded by pi-lens. Place files under rules/tree-sitter-queries/<language>/.

id.description: Unique rule identifier (kebab-case recommended). Must be unique within the language.

name.description: Human-readable rule name. Defaults to id.

category.description: Broad category label, e.g. 'security', 'performance', 'correctness'. Defaults to 'general'.

language.description: Language override. Normally inferred from the directory name.

message.description: Short diagnostic message shown inline. Defaults to 'Pattern: <id>'.

description.description: Extended explanation shown in the detail view. Markdown supported.

query.description: Tree-sitter S-expression query. Capture names should use @UPPER_SNAKE convention.

metavars.description: Capture names to surface as evidence. Auto-extracted from @VAR patterns in the query if omitted.

predicates.description: Native tree-sitter predicates (run in WASM). Faster than post-filters.

type.description: 'eq' for exact match, 'match' for regex, 'any-of' for a list of values.

value.description: Value(s) to match against. Use an array for 'any-of'.

post_filter.description: Named post-processing filter applied after the query matches.

post_filter_params.description: Parameters passed to the post_filter function.

inline_tier.description: Override the dispatch tier for this rule.

confidence.description: Confidence in the signal quality of this rule.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and reporting, e.g. ['security', 'owasp-top-10'].

has_fix.description: Whether a machine-applicable fix is available. Defaults to false.

fix_action.description: Short label for the fix suggestion shown in the UI.

good.description: Corrected version of the bad example.
